keywords: Redis MULTI EXEC quota atomic materialization no individual SET loop tier definitions FREEDOM config quota key filter keyCount TenantQuotaMaterialized T607
teachingPoint: T607 TenantQuotaMaterializer MUST write all quota keys in a single Redis MULTI/EXEC transaction. Individual SET loops are prohibited — a crash between iterations creates partial quota enforcement. All quota values MUST derive from tier definitions in FREEDOM config (tenant_quota_tier_{tier}). A quota key filter MUST exclude non-quota keys before the transaction is built.
ironRules: All quota keys written in one Redis MULTI/EXEC — individual SET loop is prohibited
Quota values derived from FREEDOM config tier definition — no hardcoded constants
QUOTA_KEY_FILTER applied before MULTI/EXEC — non-quota keys excluded
TenantQuotaMaterialized event includes keyCount matching number of keys in EXEC
On EXEC failure, DataProcessResult.failure returned — no partial quota state possible
